Indian Institute of Science Bachelor of.note: Official IISc year-wise BS (Research) cutoff PDF (AY 2021-22 to 2025-26). Category-rank closing cutoffs across admission channels: IAT, JEE Advanced, JEE Main, NEET.

Indian Institute of Space Science and Te.note: IIST admits via JEE Advanced on a percentage-of-marks basis (not JoSAA rank). Branch x category opening/closing JEE-Advanced percentage for 2025, recorded as percentile/score (ranks N/A). Source: phodu.club compilation.

Indian Institutes of Science Education a.note: IISER IAT 2024 Round-1 campus x category closing category-ranks (BS-MS + Bhopal BS-Engineering/Economics), 7 IISERs. Source: careers360.

Indira Gandhi National Tribal University.note: Admission via CUET/merit list with closing MARKS per program (not college-branch ranks); the specific Folk Literature/Tribal Studies programme was discontinued (Nov 2024). No college-wise opening/closing rank cutoffs published.

Indira Kala Sangeet University Entrance.note: IKSV Khairagarh admits via audition/aptitude test + interview + academic merit; releases seat-allotment merit lists only. No college/branch/category opening-closing rank or percentile cutoffs are published.

Institute of Hotel Management Catering T.note: The Vegetarian Culinary Arts option sits inside the B.Sc HHA programme admitted via NCHMCT JEE. IHM-wise opening/closing ranks by category, NCHMCT JEE 2026 Round 2. Source: toprankers.
